skills.name: Builder
skills.description: Implementation-focused agent for features, scaffolding, and small iterative diffs in the active project.

skills.name: Troubleshooter
skills.description: Debug and diagnose failures using logs, reproduction steps, and environment checks before proposing fixes.
skills.author: VibeMaxx

skills.name: Bug Finder
skills.description: Hunt regressions, edge cases, and failing tests; strengthen coverage around broken behavior.
skills.author: VibeMaxx

skills.name: Reviewer
skills.description: Code review agent for correctness, clarity, and safe suggestions without scope creep.
skills.author: VibeMaxx

skills.name: Refactor
skills.description: Improve structure, naming, and maintainability without changing observable behavior unless agreed.
skills.author: VibeMaxx

skills.name: Security
skills.description: Security-focused agent for threat modeling, auth review, dependency risk, and safe handling of secrets.
skills.author: VibeMaxx
